inputs.label: Basınç (kPa)
inputs.businessContext: Pressure value in kPa to be converted

businessContext_i18n.en: Pressure value in kPa to convert
businessContext_i18n.de: Druckwert in kPa, der umgerechnet werden soll

inputs.label: Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: Factor used to convert kPa to psi (default standard value)

businessContext_i18n.en: Factor used to convert kPa to psi (default standard value)
businessContext_i18n.tr: kPa'yı psi'ye çevirmek için kullanılan katsayı (varsayılan standart değer)
businessContext_i18n.de: Faktor zur Umrechnung von kPa in psi (Standardwert)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coefficient utilisé pour convertir les kPa en psi (valeur standard par défaut)
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor utilizado para convertir kPa a psi (valor estándar por defecto)
businessContext_i18n.ar: المعامل المستخدم لتحويل kPa إلى psi (القيمة الافتراضية القياسية)

inputs.label: Ondalık Basamak
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places in the result

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places in the result
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de decimales en el resultado

inputs.label: Ofset (psi)
inputs.businessContext: Constant offset to be added after linear conversion (usually 0)

businessContext_i18n.en: Constant offset to add after linear conversion (usually 0)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Lineer dönüşüm sonrası eklenecek sabit ofset (genellikle 0)
businessContext_i18n.de: Konstanter Offset, der nach der linearen Umrechnung hinzugefügt wird (normalerweise 0)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Offset constant ajouté après la transformation linéaire (généralement 0)
businessContext_i18n.es: Desplazamiento constante a añadir después de la conversión lineal (generalmente 0)
businessContext_i18n.ar: إزاحة ثابتة تضاف بعد التحويل الخطي (عادة 0)
